_meta.verified: adversarially fact-checked by a second agent against primary sources (deepinme research workflow, 2026-07)
_meta.source: see reference/sources.md and _meta of related item files

centers.description: The nine types are organized into three Centers of intelligence; each Center has a dominant/underlying emotion its three types must come to terms with.

instinctive_gut_body.theme: Autonomy, control, resistance, and maintaining boundaries against the environment.

feeling_heart.theme: Identity, self-image, and the search for value, recognition, and love from others.

thinking_head.theme: Security, guidance, and managing anxiety about the future and inner support.

centers.note: In Riso-Hudson usage the central type of each Center (9 for Instinctive, 3 for Feeling, 6 for Thinking) most represents yet is most out of touch with that Center's dominant faculty.
